summary: Iteration 19: Frontend UI testing for 6 NEW mobile service pages (5 commercial sub-pages + 1 local page). All 8 test features PASSED. Mobile pages show MobileServiceLanding template with correct hero titles, COMMON ISSUES WE FIX chips, WE SERVICE brand grid (8 logos in #F8FAFC cards), and sticky bottom bar. Desktop pages show ApplianceRepairPageNew template (not mobile).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 new pages use useIsMobile hook (breakpoint 768px) for responsive switching. MobileServiceLanding template props: heroTitle, heroSubtitle, heroBg, issues (chips), faqs, brands. Desktop uses ApplianceRepairPageNew. Brand logos in 4-column grid with #F8FAFC (rgb(248, 250, 252)) background.
